info.english_meaning: to striketo hurtto stabto pierce to hit to cause pain to pinch
info.hindI_arTa: mAranA pIwanA duHKa denA cuBAnA CedanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' tAqanaM - prAyeRa vidAraRaparyantam ' iti DA.kA. vyAKyA (2-63)

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apa SatrUn viDyatAM saM vidAne' (f॰6.75.4) (ArtnI) SatrUn parAsyatAm ityAha
'yo'gnInapaviDyAtkfcCraM dvAdaSarAtraM caritvA punarAdaDIta' (va॰Da॰1.23) apaviDyet iti pAWAntaram utsfjedityarTaH
'abravIdattaraH pArTamapavidDaH SarErBfSam' (BA॰vi॰61.3) apavidDaH=vidDaH apaSabda iha viSezakfnna BfSam ityanena gatArTatvAt
'tAH svamaNgamaDiropya dolayA preNKayan parijanApavidDayA' (raGu॰192.8) parijanenApavidDayA paricArakEH samprezitayA samprezya prerya tyaktayetyarTaH

'mahAnilenAdrimivApavidDam' (BA॰karRa॰91.60) apavidDam=avakIrRam BraMSitam -'tArkzyasya pakzapavanograjavApavidDaM SfNgaM gireriva ca tasya himottarIyam' (avadA॰jA॰30.23) apavidDaM kziptam 'yenApavidDasalilaH sPuwanAgasadmA' (ambuDiH)' (ki॰5.30) apavidDasalilaH=kziptajalaH AloqitodakaH 'mfditAScApavidDASca dfSyante kamalasrajaH' (rA॰2.94.24) ukto'rTaH
'CatrARAM cApavidDAnAM cAmarARAM ca saYcayaH' (BA॰droRa॰192.8) tyaktAnAM vikIrRAnAm ityAha
'sa praviSyASramapadamapavidDavfsImaWam' (BA॰vana॰217.48) apavidDA itastato viSIrRA vfsyo maWASca yatra
'hfdayamaSaraRaM me pakzmalAkzyAH kawAkzErapahftamapavidDaM pItamunmUlitaM vA' (mAlatI॰1.28) apavidDam=vikzatam atrApaSabdo vyaDanakriyAgarhAmAha
'yadA hi gargARAM vAhanamapavidDaM tizWati' (8.4.8 sUtre BAzye)
'mAtApitfByAmutsfzwaM tayoranyatareRa vA yaM putraM parigfhRIyApavidDaH sa ucyate' (manu॰9.171)..
'maRInAmapaveDe ca daRqaH praTamasAhasaH' (manu॰9.286) apaveDo mOktikArasTAne veDo yena tadvEkftamApadyate
'apa Satrun viDyatAM saMvidAne ArtnI ime' (f0 6754) pustake Dftamidam uktapUrvasyABivyaktaye cehAnuvAdaH apapUrvo vyaDirapanaye vartate
'anayEvApavidDAni svanavanti mahAnti ca' (ABaraRAni) (rA0 51546) apavidDAni vikIrRAni pAtitAni
'saMvyADe yUpena ca sPyena ca brAhmaRA raTena ca SareRa ca rAjanyabanDavaH' (Sa0 brA0 1242) saMvyADe samprahAre
'niraviDyat pratodena nAsikAyAM punaH punaH' (BA0 anu0 2610) niHSezam aviDyat
'tena marmaRi nirvidDaH SareRAnupamena hi' (rA0 34420) nirvidDaH kzataH vikzataH
'mA no vidan vi vyADino mo aBivyADino vidan' (aTarva0 1191) vivyADino dUrAdye viDyanti viSabdo viprakarzamAha
'garBo vyAvidDaM parivartate' (kA0 saM0 Kila0 rakta0 Slo0 57) idaM kriyAviSezaRam AvidDaM kuwilaM Bugnamiti cAmaraH tena viratrAtiriktaH supariharaH
'kva ca SastraM kva ca kzAtraM tapaH kva ca vanaM kva ca vyAvidDamidam' (rA0 3927)' vyAvidDaM parasparavyAhatam saMkulam
'cikzepa tarasA vIro vyAviDya (gadAM) satyavikramaH' (BA0 vana0 1619) vyAviDya BramayitvA
'aByAhato GawaH yena tasyopari SatakapAlo vyAvidDasakturnipatitaH' (tantrA0 51) vyAvidDasakturvikIrRasaktuH DAnAcUrRaM saktavaH syuH (ityamaraH)
'AviDyad hastatalayoruBayorarjunastadA' (BA0 droRa0 10331) AviDyat atAqayat prAharat tatra cCidramakarot
'nivassvAviDya ca srajam' (Bawwi0 2011) AviDya (Sirasi) kzipa lowi rUpam
'tataH SAlvaM gadAM gurvImAviDyantaM mahAhave dviDA cakAra sahasA prajajvAla ca tejasA' (BA0 vana0 32337) AviDyantam prAsyantam
'SabdAnukArI saNkrudDo darpAvidDasawAnanaH' (hari0 21315) AvidDA BramitAH sawA yasya tAdfgAnanaM yasya sa evamBUtaH
'yaTA''vidDaM yAti' (vikrama0 428) kuwilaM yaTA syAttaTA yAti sa pARqurAvidDavimAnamAlinIM (laNkApurIm) AvidDA'tisaMnikarzeRa niveSitA vimAnamAlA tadvatIm
'vAtAvidDena BAmini kASapuzpalavenedaM sASrupAtaM muKaM mama' (svapna0 47) vAtAvidDena vAyunetaH preritena
'sa mahADanaratnOGo vastrakambalaPenavAn pARqusAgaramAvidDaH' (BA0 saBA0 534) AvidDaH sarvato viprakIrRaH
'AvidDAveva dfSyete raTinO tO raTottamO' (BA0 Adi0 2263) AvidDO=alAtacakravad BramitO
'anAvidDaM ratnaM kisalayamalUnaM kararuhEH' (SA0 210) anAvidDaM SalAkayA'kftacCidraM vajreRAnutkIrRam
'tena sahasA gfhItvA SilAyAmAviDya vigataprARaH kftaH' (tantrA0 114) AviDya kziptvA
'tAM vyavAsfjadAviDya krudDaH karRaM prati' (BA0 droRa0 14066) ukto'rTaH
'AviDyAviDya tO vfkzAn muhUrttamitaretaram tAqayAmAsatuH…' (BA0 vana0 15761).. anantarodIrita evArTaH

'yattvAM saMcodayati me vaca AviDya rAGava' (rA0 22436) AviDya Akzipya AcCidya AviDo viDyate yenetyamaraH GaYarTe kaviDAnaM sTAsnApAvyaDihaniyuDyarTam (pA0 3358 sU0 vA0) tenANpUrvAdviDyateH kapratyayo GaYarTe karaRe**
'anAvidDaM ratnaM kisalayamalUnaM kararuhEH' (SA0 210) anAvidDaM CidrakaryA SalAkayA'kftacCidram
'AvyADinInAM pataye namaH' (kARva saM0 172) A samAntAd viDyantItyAvyADinyaH
'namaH sahamAnAya nivyADine' (kARva saM0 172) nitarAM viDyati hanti SatrUn iti nivyADI
'A rAzwre rAjanyaH SUra izavyotivyADI mahAraTo jAyatAm' (vA0 saM0 2222) ativyADI dUrAd vyaDanaSIlaH yo vA nizpatrA karotyarIn
'mA no vidan vivyADino mo aBivyADino vidan' (aTarva0 1191) aBimuKamAgatya viDyanti ye te'BivyADinaH
'sa tu bAREH SitEstUrRaM pratyaviDyata mAriza' (BA0 droRa0 4714) pratyaviDyat parErvidDaH sannaviDyadityarTaH
'apratividDasyAtyayaH sapAdaH saptaviMSatipaRaH' (kO0 a0 21941) apratividDo'mudritaH atyayo daRqaH
'tasya na kutaScanopAvyADo Bavati' (tE0 brA0 177) upAvyADo bADaH
